Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ilana]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Ilana is a companion of Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Ilana is part of Alin's party.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — The Naraka Incarnation spilled Ilana to the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Alin needs to find Ilana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Alin was carrying Ilana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Ilana is Alin's sister.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Ilana's family caused the current situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Alin wants to rescue Ilana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Ilana is facing the Ragnarus Incarnation.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
